name: jstack
description: Team operations toolkit: project management, sprint ops, engineering metrics, incident response, knowledge management, session lifecycle, personal productivity, JIRA/Notion CRUD, reports, GitHub metrics, browser workflow automation, scheduled routines, research, meetings, MCP discovery, evals, and telemetry (opt-in).

defaultPrompt: Scan Slack and Jira for action items
